subject: Charged twice this month
body: I just checked my statement and I was billed $49 twice on the same day. Please refund the duplicate charge.

subject: How do I export my data to CSV?
body: I want to download all my records as a spreadsheet. Is there an export button somewhere?

subject: Site is completely down
body: None of my team can log in. We get a 503 on every page. This is blocking our whole company right now.

subject: Can you add dark mode?
body: Love the product. It would be great to have a dark theme for late-night work.

subject: Reset my password
body: I forgot my password and the reset email never arrives. Can you help me get back in?

subject: Suspicious login from another country
body: I got an alert about a login from Brazil but I live in Canada. I think my account is compromised.

subject: Invoice missing VAT number
body: Our finance team needs the invoice to include our company VAT number for tax purposes.

subject: API returns 429 constantly
body: We are hitting rate limits even at low volume. Are the documented limits correct? This is breaking our integration.

subject: Want to cancel and get a refund
body: This didn't work out for us. I'd like to cancel my annual plan and get a prorated refund.

subject: Typo on the pricing page
body: Small thing — the pricing page says 'montly' instead of 'monthly'.

subject: Can't upload files larger than 5MB
body: Every time I try to attach a bigger file it fails silently. What's the limit and can it be raised?

subject: Downgrade to the free plan
body: I'd like to move from Pro back to the free tier at the end of my billing cycle.

subject: Data looks wrong after last sync
body: Since this morning's sync some records show duplicated rows. Worried we may be losing data integrity.

subject: Do you have a Slack integration?
body: We'd love notifications pushed into our team Slack channel. Is that on the roadmap?

subject: Update the credit card on file
body: My old card expired. How do I add a new payment method?

subject: GDPR data deletion request
body: Under GDPR I am requesting that you delete all personal data you hold about me.

subject: Dashboard charts not loading
body: The analytics charts spin forever and never render. Console shows a network timeout.

subject: Thanks for the quick fix!
body: Just wanted to say your team resolved my issue fast yesterday. Great support.
